positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The central elements are glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate, abstract leaf clusters forming a natural pattern. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep indigo, teal, forest green, and pops of glowing electric yellow/cyan. The style should be flat vector art mixed with intricate linework, resembling modern botanical etching or Japanese woodblock print aesthetics. Ensure strong, clean silhouettes suitable for screen printing on apparel. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical. The scene should feel enchanting and serene, perfect for a versatile, broad-audience lifestyle print. High detail, crisp lines, no gradients, vector perfection.
negative: photorealistic, render, 3d, blurry, gradient, watermark, text, logo, signature, messy, noisy, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, noise, grain, poor quality, jpeg artifacts
